name: Transformed by the Overlord
description:
You fought the dark Overlord. And lost. Badly, it wasn't even close. Still, you took down some valuable generals of their army/harem. He will now make you pay by forcing you to take their place, but what new form will he give you as punishment?

Image: Berserker (Fate/zero)

Art by: Pixiv ID 51976199 (Name unknown)
creator: Oh really?
